description: Weekly GPU capacity planning report — Executive Summary, Utilization Percentiles, Workload Classification, MIG Fragmentation, Efficiency Score, and Growth Trends

panels.description: Average GPU utilization (DCGM_FI_DEV_GPU_UTIL) across all devices
panels.title: Avg GPU Util %

panels.description: Maximum GPU utilization observed across any device in the period
panels.title: Peak GPU Util %

panels.description: Average VRAM utilization across all devices
panels.title: Avg VRAM Util %

panels.description: Number of devices with GPU utilization above 85% — sustained saturation indicator
panels.title: Devices GPU > 85%

panels.description: Percentage of GPUs with GPU_UTIL below 5% — effectively idle, potential waste
panels.title: Idle GPU %

panels.description: Composite efficiency: 0.5×GPU_UTIL + 0.3×DRAM_ACTIVE + 0.2×VRAM. <40% underutilized, 40-70% healthy, >80% structural risk

targets.expr:
avg(
  sum by (gpu, GPU_I_ID, UUID) (
    (DCGM_FI_DEV_GPU_UTIL * 0.5)
    + (DCGM_FI_PROF_DRAM_ACTIVE * 100 * 0.3)
    + ((DCGM_FI_DEV_FB_USED / (DCGM_FI_DEV_FB_USED + DCGM_FI_DEV_FB_FREE)) * 100 * 0.2)
  )
)

panels.title: Efficiency Score

panels.description: Median GPU utilization across the time window — half of all cluster-average samples were below this value
panels.title: GPU Util P50

panels.description: 90th percentile GPU utilization — 90% of cluster-average samples were below this. Rising P90 signals structural load growth.
panels.title: GPU Util P90

panels.description: 95th percentile GPU utilization — reveals peak saturation windows. If avg=60% and P95=92%, the cluster saturates 5% of the time.
panels.title: GPU Util P95

panels.description: 99th percentile GPU utilization — worst-case saturation tail. Relevant for SLA-sensitive inference workloads.
panels.title: GPU Util P99

panels.description: Median GR_ENGINE_ACTIVE — cross-reference with GPU_UTIL P50. A large gap means GPU_UTIL is inflated by non-compute activity (memory copy, context switches).
panels.title: GR Engine P50

panels.description: 95th percentile GR_ENGINE_ACTIVE — confirms whether GPU_UTIL P95 peaks are compute-bound. High GR_ENGINE P95 = real compute saturation.
panels.title: GR Engine P95

panels.description: Mean DRAM bus activity over the window. >80% sustained indicates memory bandwidth bottleneck — common during training on B200/H100.
panels.title: DRAM Active % (mean)

panels.description: 90th percentile VRAM utilization over the window. In LLM clusters, VRAM saturation typically precedes compute saturation as models grow.
panels.title: VRAM P90

panels.description: Devices with GPU_UTIL > 60% — typical of training jobs (high compute + high DRAM)
panels.title: High Compute (GPU > 60%)

panels.description: Devices with GPU_UTIL 10-60% — typical of inference services (moderate compute + high FB)
panels.title: Medium Compute (GPU 10-60%)

panels.description: Devices with GPU_UTIL ≤ 10% — idle or model preloaded with no active requests
panels.title: Idle / Low Compute (GPU ≤ 10%)

panels.description: GPU compute (GR Engine Active %) distribution across namespaces
panels.title: Compute by Namespace

panels.description: Total GR Engine Active % summed per GPU model (whole GPUs) and per model+profile (MIG slices). 100% = one full device equivalent in use. 400% = four slices/GPUs of that type fully utilised.
panels.title: Compute by GPU Type / Profile

panels.description: MIG slice inventory by profile — Total allocated vs Active (has workload)
panels.title: MIG Profile Distribution

panels.description: Percentage of MIG slices with no active workload pod — fragmentation risk indicator

targets.expr:
(
  count(DCGM_FI_DEV_FB_USED{GPU_I_ID!=""})
  - (count(DCGM_FI_DEV_FB_USED{GPU_I_ID!="", exported_pod!=""}) or vector(0))
) / count(DCGM_FI_DEV_FB_USED{GPU_I_ID!=""}) * 100 or vector(0)

panels.title: MIG Idle %

panels.description: Total MIG slices provisioned across all nodes
panels.title: Total MIG Instances

panels.description: MIG slices currently assigned to a workload pod
panels.title: Active MIG Instances

panels.description: Composite efficiency per GPU/MIG: 0.5×GPU_UTIL + 0.3×DRAM_ACTIVE + 0.2×VRAM. Red <40% = underutilized, Green 40-70% = healthy, >80% = structural risk

targets.expr:
sum by (gpu, GPU_I_ID, GPU_I_PROFILE, Hostname, modelName, UUID) (
  (DCGM_FI_DEV_GPU_UTIL * 0.5)
  + (DCGM_FI_PROF_DRAM_ACTIVE * 100 * 0.3)
  + ((DCGM_FI_DEV_FB_USED / (DCGM_FI_DEV_FB_USED + DCGM_FI_DEV_FB_FREE)) * 100 * 0.2)
)

panels.title: Efficiency Score by Device

panels.description: Count of devices with GPU_UTIL > 85% — early warning for capacity exhaustion. Sustained count >0 requires capacity action.
panels.title: Saturated Devices (GPU > 85%) over Time

panels.description: Average GPU_UTIL over time. Upward trend signals growing compute demand. At +4%/week → 85% saturation in ~5 weeks. Switch to 30d range to see 4-week growth.
panels.title: GPU Util % Trend

panels.description: Average VRAM utilization over time. Rising average signals model scaling (larger models being served). VRAM saturation often precedes compute saturation in LLM clusters.
panels.title: VRAM Utilization % Trend

panels.description: Average GR_ENGINE_ACTIVE over time. Cross-reference with GPU_UTIL trend: divergence indicates memory-copy or other non-compute activity inflating GPU_UTIL.
panels.title: GR Engine Active % Trend

panels.description: Composite efficiency trend (0.5×GPU_UTIL + 0.3×DRAM_ACTIVE + 0.2×VRAM). Healthy band: 40-70%. Sustained >80% requires capacity action.

targets.expr:
avg(
  sum by (gpu, GPU_I_ID, UUID) (
    (DCGM_FI_DEV_GPU_UTIL * 0.5)
    + (DCGM_FI_PROF_DRAM_ACTIVE * 100 * 0.3)
    + ((DCGM_FI_DEV_FB_USED / (DCGM_FI_DEV_FB_USED + DCGM_FI_DEV_FB_FREE)) * 100 * 0.2)
  )
)

panels.title: Efficiency Score Trend

title: GPU Weekly Capacity Planning Report
